action.reasoning: Observation: Empty workspace, starting fresh. Task is ADE20K semantic segmentation with 150 classes. Analysis: Need to build pipeline quickly. With 4 GPUs and 30 iterations / 10h budget, I'll start with a strong pretrained backbone. Best option for quick high mIoU: UperNet with Swin-Large or ConvNeXt-Large backbone. Decision: Build training pipeline with ConvNeXt-Large + UperNet head (proven SOTA on ADE20K), do quick baseline first to validate pipeline.
